document.title: Dataset Description and Data Definitions for Select Datasets on DOT's Open Data Catalog
document.source: U.S. Department of Transportation — Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration (FMCSA)
document.update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time

daily_difference.description: Includes records updated or added since the previous run. May also include all other records for the entity and associated records for completeness.

full_baseline.description: Includes all records (including historical values where appropriate) as of the latest dataset update.

datasets.name: Carrier
datasets.description: Records for all carriers/brokers/freight forwarders with active, inactive, or pending authorities (common or contract). Includes DOT number, docket number, entity census, authority, and insurance data.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: RFC Number
fields.definition: Mexican Government registration code for Mexican carriers

fields.name: BIPD Required
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance required (in thousands)

fields.name: BIPD on File
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance on file (in thousands)

datasets.name: Insur
datasets.description: Records for carrier/broker/freight forwarder active or pending individual insurance policies. Linked to entities by docket number. Entities can hold multiple policies. The daily difference variant shows policy removals as blank records (empty or 00000 values except docket number).

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: Insurance Type
fields.note: For type 1, amounts are in fields 4 and 5. For types 2-4, amounts in fields 4 and 5 will be 0.

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Dollar Limit
fields.definition: Maximum liability amount in thousands (company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of)

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (policy may be administered by a company branch with a different name)

datasets.name: ActPendInsur
datasets.description: Information on the implementation dates of an active or pending insurance policy (posted date, effective date, and cancel effective date), along with insurance company name, BI&PD limits, and the DOT/docket number of the entity.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Form Code
fields.note: For form codes 91, 91X, and 82, amounts are in fields 8 and 9. For codes 34, 83, 84, and 85, amounts will be 0.

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (policy may be administered by a company branch with a different name)

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Limit
fields.definition: BI&PD underlying limit amount in thousands

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Limit
fields.definition: BI&PD maximum limit amount in thousands (company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of)

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

datasets.name: AuthHist
datasets.description: Records showing the history of each authority granted to a carrier/broker/freight forwarder, with dates of original authority action (e.g., granted) and final authority action (e.g., revoked). Multiple records possible per entity.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Sub Number
fields.definition: Action sequence number; not commonly used

fields.name: Final Authority Served Date
fields.definition: Date final authority action became effective

datasets.name: BOC3
datasets.description: Records for each BOC3 agent hired by a carrier/broker/freight forwarder. Each entity must hire a BOC3 agent for legal representation to obtain operating authority. Some entities may act as their own BOC3 agent.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Zip Code
fields.definition: Process agent company address zip code

datasets.name: InsHist
datasets.description: Historical insurance policy records for carriers/brokers/freight forwarders. Contains cancellation method, policy type, policy number, and effective/cancellation dates. Important: all insurance information relates to the policy being cancelled, replaced, or prior to a name change — not the subsequent policy.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Cancel/Replace/Name Change/Transfer Form
fields.definition: The form that executed the cancellation, replacement, name change, or transfer

values.36: BMC Surety Bond Cancellation Form (for Cancelled)
values.85C: BMC Cancellation for Trust Funds (for Cancelled)

values.*: Not BIPD (Cargo, Surety, or Trust Fund)

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity, in thousands

fields.name: Insurance Class Code
fields.definition: For BI&PD form codes; indicates primary (P) or excess (E)

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Effective date of the insurance policy

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Limit Amount
fields.definition: Underlying limit amount in thousands. When insurance class code is E, this is the value of the primary insurance.
fields.note: For form codes 91, 91X, 82 only. For 34, 83, 84, 85 this will be 0.

fields.name: BI&PD Max Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the insurance policy, in thousands

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

values.Term/REPL: Replacement was executed by a new policy submission

datasets.name: Rejected
datasets.description: Information on insurance forms rejected by FMCSA, including the associated policy info, rejection date, and rejection reason.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Insurance type associated with the rejected form

fields.name: Maximum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the insurance policy, in thousands

fields.name: Rejected Date
fields.definition: Date the submitted form was rejected

fields.name: Rejected Reason
fields.definition: The reason the form was rejected

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity, in thousands

datasets.name: Revocation
datasets.description: Information on carrier/broker/freight forwarder authorities that have been revoked by FMCSA, including the type of authority revoked and the reason.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Operating Authority Registration Type
fields.definition: Operating authority type: common, contract, or broker

fields.name: Serve Date
fields.definition: Date the first revocation letter was sent to the entity

disclaimer: Data is provided as a public service by FMCSA for informational purposes only. Datasets are point-in-time snapshots and do not constitute legal advice or a legal contract.
